HGSS.444.0000:
Professor Oak: Ah, [0103,0000,0000]!
It’s good of you to come all this way\r
to Kanto.\f
What do you think of the Trainers
out here?\r
Pretty tough, huh?\f
HGSS.444.0001:
Professor Oak: Ah, [0103,0000,0000]!
It’s good of you to come all this way\r
to Kanto.\f
What do you think of the Trainers
out here?\r
Pretty tough, huh?\f
HGSS.444.0003:
If you’re in the area, I hope you
come visit again.
HGSS.444.0004:
You never cease to amaze me!\f
Your having completed the National
Pokédex far exceeded my expectations!\f
Meeting you is something l will cherish
all my life long!\f
HGSS.444.0005:
You never cease to amaze me!\f
Your having completed the National
Pokédex far exceeded my expectations!\f
Meeting you is something l will cherish
all my life long!\f
HGSS.444.0006:
Professor Oak: Those Badges are...\f
Wow! You have not only become the
Johto Champion, but you’ve collected\r
all the Kanto Badges! Well done!\f
Hmm... No wonder I sensed something
in you when we met.\f
Tell you what, [0103,0000,0000].\f
I’ll make arrangements so that you can
go to Mt. Silver.\f
Mt. Silver is a big mountain that is
home to many wild Pokémon.\f
It’s too dangerous for your average
Trainer, so it’s off limits.\f
But we can make an exception in your
case, [0103,0000,0000].\f
Go to the Pokémon League
Reception Gate.\f
You can reach Mt. Silver from there.
HGSS.444.0007:
Professor Oak: Those Badges are...\f
Wow! You have not only become the
Johto Champion, but you’ve collected\r
all the Kanto Badges! Well done!\f
Hmm... No wonder I sensed something
in you when we met.\f
Tell you what, [0103,0000,0000].\f
I’ll make arrangements so that you can
go to Mt. Silver.\f
Mt. Silver is a big mountain that is
home to many wild Pokémon.\f
It’s too dangerous for your average
Trainer, so it’s off limits.\f
But we can make an exception in your
case, [0103,0000,0000].\f
Go to the Pokémon League
Reception Gate.\f
You can reach Mt. Silver from there.
HGSS.444.0008:
Professor Oak: Hmm? You’re not
collecting Kanto Gym Badges?\f
The Gym Leaders in Kanto are as tough
as any you battled in Johto.\r
I recommend that you challenge them.\f
HGSS.444.0009:
Professor Oak: Ah, you’re collecting
Kanto Gym Badges.\f
I imagine that it’s hard, but the
experience will surely help you.\f
Come see me when you get them all.
I’ll have a gift for you.\r
Keep it up, [0103,0000,0000]!\f
HGSS.444.0010:
Professor Oak: Ah, you’re collecting
Kanto Gym Badges.\f
I imagine that it’s hard, but the
experience will surely help you.\f
Come see me when you get them all.
I’ll have a gift for you.\r
Keep it up, [0103,0000,0000]!\f
HGSS.444.0011:
Professor Oak: Oh, [0103,0000,0000]!
What brought you here?\f
HGSS.444.0012:
Professor Oak: Oh, [0103,0000,0000]!
What brought you here?\f
HGSS.444.0013:
Professor Oak: The legendary Pokémon
that appear in the Hoenn myth?\f
You must be talking about KYOGRE
and GROUDON!\f
HGSS.444.0014:
Professor Oak: The Embedded Tower is
probably the ruins that has something\r
to do with the Hoenn myth.\r
If so, the other one must be around.\f
KYOGRE and GROUDON are said to have
shaped the seas and lands!\f
Where those two are, the other Pokémon
is said to appear as well...\r
All this is quite possible!\f
HGSS.444.0015:
Professor Oak: It’s not hard to imagine
that the Red Orb will make GROUDON\r
appear at the Embedded Tower...\f
However, according to Mr. Pokémon,
GROUDON does not show itself to\r
Trainers with golden hearts, but only\r
to those with shining-silver spirits.\f
It may be difficult for you alone to
accomplish this, [0103,0000,0000].\f
But if you manage to obtain a GROUDON
that came from the Embedded Tower,\f
please do come and show me both
legendary Pokémon!\f
I will then share with you the rest of
the Hoenn myth!\f
HGSS.444.0016:
Professor Oak: It’s not hard to imagine
that the Red Orb will make GROUDON\r
appear at the Embedded Tower...\f
However, according to Mr. Pokémon,
GROUDON does not show itself to\r
Trainers with golden hearts, but only\r

It may be difficult for you alone to

But if you manage to obtain a GROUDON

please do come and show me both

I will then share with you the rest of

HGSS.444.0017:
Professor Oak: It’s not hard to imagine
that the Blue Orb will make KYOGRE\r
appear at the Embedded Tower...\f
However, according to Mr. Pokémon,
KYOGRE does not show itself to\r
Trainers with shining-silver spirits,\r
but only to those with golden hearts.\f
It may be difficult for you alone to
accomplish this, [0103,0000,0000].\f
But if you manage to obtain a KYOGRE
that came from the Embedded Tower,\f
please do come and show me both
legendary Pokémon!\f
I will then share with you the rest
of the Hoenn myth!\f
HGSS.444.0018:
Professor Oak: It’s not hard to imagine
that the Blue Orb will make KYOGRE\r
appear at the Embedded Tower...\f
However, according to Mr. Pokémon,
KYOGRE does not show itself to\r
Trainers with shining-silver spirits,\r
but only to those with golden hearts.\f
It may be difficult for you alone to
accomplish this, [0103,0000,0000].\f
But if you manage to obtain a KYOGRE
that came from the Embedded Tower,\f
please do come and show me both
legendary Pokémon!\f
I will then share with you the rest

HGSS.444.0019:
Professor Oak: You did it,
[0103,0000,0000]!\r
You caught both KYOGRE and GROUDON!\r
OK!\r
I would like to entrust this to you!\f
HGSS.444.0020:
Professor Oak: You did it,
[0103,0000,0000]!\r
You caught both KYOGRE and GROUDON!\r
OK!\r
I would like to entrust this to you!\f
HGSS.444.0021:
Professor Oak: It resembles the Orb
you received from Mr. Pokémon,\r
doesn’t it?\f
It is called the Jade Orb.
It has something to do with RAYQUAZA.\f
Legend has it that the battle
between GROUDON and KYOGRE\r
shaped the lands and seas of Hoenn.\f
Volcanic eruptions and giant waves are
said to have completely changed the\r
shape of the land there.\f
But then RAYQUAZA came down to
halt the battle.\f
It is a Pokémon that rules the skies!\f
If the Embedded Tower is related to
KYOGRE and GROUDON,\f
then going there with that Jade Orb
will surely make something happen.\f
HGSS.444.0022:
Professor Oak: Go to the Embedded
Tower with the Jade Orb!\f
HGSS.444.0023:
Professor Oak: You have successfully
caught RAYQUAZA!\f
The strong power of the Jade Orb
must have attracted RAYQUAZA there!\f
Pokémon are sometimes greatly
attracted by certain Orbs and Stones.\r
No one knows why.\f
Perhaps memories from ancient times...\r
when this planet was born...\r
and Pokémon, also...\r
are making Pokémon behave that way.\f
HGSS.444.0024:
Professor Oak: Hello, [0103,0000,0000]!
The study of Pokémon never ends.\f
It is such pure joy to work toward
perfection!\f
By the way...\f
Hmm? Those Pokémon!\r
They were at the Embedded Tower?\f
They are KYOGRE and GROUDON--
the Pokémon from the Hoenn myth!\f
I never dreamed you would catch
such Pokémon...\f
You have proven yourself worthy!
Congratulations!\f
I would like to entrust this to you,
[0103,0000,0000]!\f
HGSS.444.0025:
Professor Oak: Hello, [0103,0000,0000]!
The study of Pokémon never ends.\f
It is such pure joy to work toward
perfection!\f
By the way...\f
Hmm? Those Pokémon!\r

I never dreamed you would catch
such Pokémon...\f
You have proven yourself worthy!
Congratulations!\f
I would like to entrust this to you,
[0103,0000,0000]!\f
HGSS.444.0028:
Professor Oak: Say!
Don’t you want to take a picture\r
with me for a change? [0200,0000]
HGSS.444.0029:
Professor Oak: You will? Good!
Are you ready?\f
HGSS.444.0030:
Professor Oak: Yes!
It’s a good memento!
HGSS.444.0031:
Professor Oak: Really?
There is no need to be reserved...
HGSS.444.0032:
Your Photo Album is full.\f
Access your PC and delete
some pictures.
HGSS.444.0033:
The Professor’s Pokémon Talk
radio show is aired here and\r
in Johto as well.\f
Professor Oak is so...cool!
HGSS.444.0034:
[0103,0000,0000], thanks to your work on
the Pokédex, the Professor’s\r
research is coming along well.
HGSS.444.0035:
So you are [0103,0000,0000]?\f
...Just between you and me,
The Professor’s show, Pokémon Talk,\r
is not live radio!
HGSS.444.0036:
There are many books.
Most of the covers are worn out.
HGSS.444.0037:
There’s an email message on the PC.\f
...\f
Hi, Professor Oak!
How is your research coming along?\f
I’m...doing fine.\f
I heard that [0103,0000,0000] is getting
quite a reputation.\f
That’s what we hear on the grapevine.
I’m delighted to hear that.\r
           Elm in New Bark Town 8-)
HGSS.444.0038:
There’s an email message on the PC.\f
...\f
Hi, Professor Oak!
How is your research coming along?\f
I’m...doing fine.\f
I heard that [0103,0000,0000] is getting
quite a reputation.\f
That’s what we hear on the grapevine.
I’m delighted to hear that.\r
           Elm in New Bark Town 8-)
HGSS.444.0039:
Professor Oak: Hello, [0103,0000,0000].
Good to see you.\r
I heard a lot about you.\f
Your Pokédex must be close
to complete?\f
For all your hard work,
I would like to give you something.\f
HGSS.444.0040:
Professor Oak: Hello, [0103,0000,0000].
Good to see you.\r
I heard a lot about you.\f
Your Pokédex must be close
to complete?\f
For all your hard work,
I would like to give you something.\f
HGSS.444.0041:
Professor Oak: Haha!\f
What’s behind me...
You must have figured it out right away.\f
Yes, it is a Pokémon!\f
HGSS.444.0042:
Professor Oak: You don’t see them
very often in Kanto.\r
Choose one and it’ll be yours!\f
...Go ahead!
HGSS.444.0043:
So, you’re claiming the
Fire Pokémon CHARMANDER? [0200,0000]
HGSS.444.0044:
So, you’ve decided on the
Water Pokémon SQUIRTLE? [0200,0000]
HGSS.444.0045:
So, you want to go with
the Grass Pokémon BULBASAUR? [0200,0000]
HGSS.444.0046: This Pokémon is really quite energetic!\f
HGSS.444.0047:
No need to hurry.
Take your time.
HGSS.444.0049:
Would you like to give a nickname to
the [0100,0001,0000] you received? [0200,0000]
HGSS.444.0050:
Is [0101,0001,0000] the nickname
you want to give? [0200,0000]
HGSS.444.0051:
Huh?
You have no room for it right now.\f
Come back when you’ve made room.
HGSS.444.0052:
Professor Oak: If a wild Pokémon
appears, your Pokémon can battle it.\f
With it at your side, you should be able
to reach the next town...\f
What am I saying?
You already know all this!\r
Hahaha!
HGSS.444.0053:
Professor Oak: There is nothing more
that I can do for you.\f
Enjoy the rest of your journey
with that new Pokémon!
HGSS.444.0054:
This is Professor Oak’s Pokémon.
[0103,0001,0000] will probably not\r
steal it like before...
HGSS.444.0055:
Professor Oak: Good to see you!
This is what I’ve wanted to\r
give to you!\f
HGSS.444.0056:
Professor Oak: That Hidden Machine
contains the move Rock Climb!\f
When you teach it to a Pokémon,
you can go up rock walls that have\r
steps carved in them.\f
HGSS.444.0057:
When you use Rock Climb,
you can go up rock walls that have\r
steps carved in them.\f
You will discover all sorts
of new things!
